description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build & Validate OPML file that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: build and deploy. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Python 3.12, installs dependencies, builds an OPML file using a script, and uploads the OPML file as an artifact if the branch is master. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, waits for the build job to complete, and deploys the OPML file to GitHub Pages if the branch is master.
